text: Jabse usne kaha ki shehar aakar main badal gaya hoon, tabse mere sar mein aisa bhari-pan hai jaise koi lohe ki hatheli dabba rahi ho. MNC ka kaam aur home loan ki EMI toh pehle hi thaka deti thi, par ab ye chest tightness sone nahi deti. 'Mard nahi rota' bachpan se suna hai, isliye bas doctor se gas ki dawai maang raha hoon kyunki gale mein kuch atka sa rehta hai.

Partner ka ye kehna ki main 'badal' gayi hoon, mere pet mein ajeeb si jalan aur acidity paida kar raha hai. Startup ki coding aur ghar ki 'izzat' ka bojh kandhon mein itni jakdan deta hai ki hila nahi jata. WFH isolation mein akele rona toh kamzori hogi, isliye main bas thakan ka bahana banakar aankhein band kar leti hoon taaki koi dard na pooche.

Uski baatein sunkar dimaag ki nasein phatne lagti hain aur poore sharir mein ajeeb si kampann hoti hai. Main family ka breadwinner hoon aur itne EMI ka pressure hai, par ab ye saans ki takleef aur dhadkan ka badhna mujhse handle nahi ho raha. 'Mard nahi rota' ye soch kar main chup rehta hoon, par sharir ka har ek hissa aise toot raha hai jaise koi viral bukhar ho.

Jab usne kaha shehar ne mujhe badal diya, tabse meri raaton ki neend ud gayi hai aur peeth mein hamesha ek chubhan rehti hai. Office ki politics aur 'samaj' ki umeedon ke beech main itna thak gaya hoon ki ab aankhon mein hamesha jalan rehti hai. Main emotionally baat nahi kar sakta kyunki mard ko toh sakht hona chahiye, isliye bas migraine ki painkiller kha kar kaam chala raha hoon.

Uske tanno ke baad se mera dum ghutne laga hai aur hatheliyon mein hamesha paseena rehta hai. WFH ki wajah se na koi community hai na dost, bas ye sar dard hai jo laptop ki screen dekhte hi badh jata hai. 'Log kya kahenge' agar main kamzor dikha, isliye main bas doctor ko bolta hoon ki thakan ki wajah se sharir mein dard rehta hai.
